question: Calculate portfolio risk metrics including beta, annual volatility, Sharpe ratio, and maximum drawdown for this portfolio.
description: Calculate portfolio risk metrics (beta, volatility, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown)

output_format.description: Return valid JSON with flat structure

example.risk_assessment: Portfolio has higher volatility than market but good risk-adjusted returns

evaluation_criteria.volatility_calculation: Accurate annualized volatility from historical returns
evaluation_criteria.sharpe_ratio_accuracy: Correct Sharpe ratio with risk-free rate
evaluation_criteria.drawdown_calculation: Accurate maximum drawdown from historical data
evaluation_criteria.risk_interpretation: Valid assessment of portfolio risk level

test_data_note: Requires historical price data for risk metric calculations
